stemHtml: According to ICAO annex 9, when crew members enter or leave a member state, the contracting state shall…

options.a: Facilitate and expedite their luggage inspection, but not the inspection of the crew members, who are subject to the same provisions which apply for the passengers.
options.b: Facilitate and expedite their inspection, but not the inspection of the crew members baggage, which is subject to the same provisions which apply for the passengers baggage.
options.c: Request a full visa in order to check if the person is a real crew member or not.
options.d: Facilitate and expedite their inspection as well as their baggage by checking their CMCs.
